$meta.description: Automatically extracted from theme.css via Style Settings metadata

Used for settings panel category headers: Used for settings panel category headers and other things
Used for folder names and other things: Used for folder names and other things
Used for settings panel body, calendar: Used for settings panel body, calendar
Underline only external links and remove: Underline only external links and remove the distinction from unresolved links
Change ==highlight== (mark) styling from: Change ==highlight== (mark) styling from the default. This may interfere with some plugins, disable this if you see issues.
Highlight the line your mouse cursor is: Highlight the line your mouse cursor is on
Highlight the row in a table that your c: Highlight the row in a table that your cursor is hovering over
Use folder icons in the file tree: Use folder icons in the file tree
Replace the chevrons in the file tree wi: Replace the chevrons in the file tree with open/closed folder icons
Globally toggle my various DV modificati: Globally toggle my various DV modifications
Toggle the list count on a DV result: Toggle the list count on a DV result
Invert the Reading and Edit view icons i: Invert the Reading and Edit view icons in the top right of notes
Make tags more boxy with a solid border: Make tags more boxy with a solid border
When hovering, the tabs area will be exp: When hovering, the tabs area will be expanded into multiple rows to make viewing tab titles easier.
Shrink down pinned tabs to only the note: Shrink down pinned tabs to only the note icon. I recommend making custom note icons as well if you do this.
Blocks the click event on the Pin icon s: Blocks the click event on the Pin icon so it cannot be removed accidently
Make stacked tabs take up 100% of the wi: Make stacked tabs take up 100% of the window width instead of an annoying amount of unknown space
Hide all attachments in the file explore: Hide all attachments in the file explorer
You must open each color and \"save\" it: You must open each color and "save" it to render properly
Hide the metadata properties box when in: Hide the metadata properties box when in reading mode. Add 'hide-properties' as a class to any file to selectively apply this.
We know it is a properties box, you don': We know it is a properties box, you don't need to label it.
Hide the \"Empty\" text that is a placeh: Hide the "Empty" text that is a placeholder for empty keys
Put every property on its own line inste: Put every property on its own line instead of a long single line list.
Globally toggle my various embed modific: Globally toggle my various embed modifications
Hide the link icon for an embedded note: Hide the link icon for an embedded note
Hide the title of an embeded note: Hide the title of an embeded note
Hide the first header in embeds: Hide the first header in embeds
Do not display the first header in an em: Do not display the first header in an embed
Do not display h1 in embeds: Do not display h1 in embeds
Do not display h2 in embeds: Do not display h2 in embeds
Do not display h3 in embeds: Do not display h3 in embeds
Do not display h4 in embeds: Do not display h4 in embeds
Do not display h5 in embeds: Do not display h5 in embeds
Do not display h6 in embeds: Do not display h6 in embeds
Remove the settings pane at the bottom o: Remove the settings pane at the bottom of the left sidebar added in 1.6
Remove the sidebar indicators. They can: Remove the sidebar indicators. They can still be opened with hotkeys
Remove the top tab container in the left: Remove the top tab container in the left sidebar in Windows in hidden frameless
Removes the header tab list icon: Removes the header tab list icon
Removes the new tab header icon: Removes the new tab header icon
Remove the close X from tabs: Remove the close X from tabs
Remove the back and forward icons: Remove the back and forward icons
Remove the view action icons from the to: Remove the view action icons from the top of notes
Remove the note icon from stacked tabs (: Remove the note icon from stacked tabs (we all know is a note...)
Hide scroll bars, hover to view them: Hide scroll bars, hover to view them
Hide the top bar on MacOS when in stacke: Hide the top bar on MacOS when in stacked tabs. (Works best in Frameless/hidden title bars)
Hide the pop up that appears when clicki: Hide the pop up that appears when clicking the search field
Globally toggle custom checkbox types an: Globally toggle custom checkbox types and changes made in PLN
Hide Meta callout in reading mode: Hide Meta callout in reading mode
Remove the custom \"meta\" callout in re: Remove the custom "meta" callout in reading mode
Hide Meta callout in PDF exports: Hide Meta callout in PDF exports
Remove the custom \"meta\" callout in PD: Remove the custom "meta" callout in PDF exports only
Hide Links callout in reading mode: Hide Links callout in reading mode
Remove the custom \"links\" callout in r: Remove the custom "links" callout in reading mode
Hide Links callout in PDF exports: Hide Links callout in PDF exports
Remove the custom \"links\" callout in P: Remove the custom "links" callout in PDF exports only
Remove the sort icon from above a collec: Remove the sort icon from above a collection of cards
Change the border of cards to match call: Change the border of cards to match callouts. You are required to have Kepano's snippet, this just changes it's style
Add cards class to all files, and allow: Add cards class to all files, and allow export.
This will add the cards class to all fil: This will add the cards class to all files, a primary function for this will be cards rendering when you PDF export a file
This is the primary color to be used in: This is the primary color to be used in vision impaired mode
This is used for code blocks and buttons: This is used for code blocks and buttons mostly
